prompt: A tailor measuring a person's body with extreme precision, sewing a suit so perfectly fitted to every curve and bump that it would only fit this exact person and no one else. The suit has hundreds of tiny stitches following every irregular contour. Photorealistic, natural lighting, real physical scene, no text, no labels, no diagrams.
metaphor: A bespoke suit tailored so precisely to one person's body that it fits only them and fails completely on anyone else.
